title: Your guide to men's March Madness Day 1: Recaps, every winner's chance to advance, more
content: Our reporters detail how each game was won Thursday and look ahead to the matchups created for Saturday.

title: Georgia Tech names ex-Troy coach Cross as HC
content: Georgia Tech has named former Troy coach Scott Cross as the school's next men's basketball head coach, it was announced Friday.

title: Luka drops 60, gets MVP chants from Heat crowd
content: Luka Doncic scored 60 points, the first Laker to do so since Kobe Bryant's career finale in 2016, as L.A. won in Miami to push its season-best win streak to eight games.

title: UNC's Davis: Fatigue not to blame for collapse
content: In a series of terse exchanges with reporters after VCU's 82-78 OT win, North Carolina coach Hubert Davis said he didn't think his team was tired and said it was "my decision" when asked why he had gone with a six-man rotation in the waning minutes.

title: Wemby's game winner puts Spurs back in playoffs
content: Victor Wembanyama nailed a go-ahead 17-foot fadeaway with 1.1 seconds left Thursday night, and the Spurs clinched a postseason berth for the first time in six seasons.

title: Rodman to be inducted in WWE HOF, sources say
content: Basketball Hall of Famer Dennis Rodman will be inducted into the WWE Hall of Fame for his time in WCW during the Monday night wars, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania.

title: LeBron ties Parish's record with 1,611th game
content: LeBron James tied Robert Parish for the NBA's all-time games-played mark, with the Hall of Famer saying James is "deserving" of breaking the record.

title: Sources: NFL to vote on Raiders succession plan
content: NFL owners are scheduled to vote on a Raiders succession plan that gives Silver Lake co-chief executive officer Egon Durban the option to purchase a majority stake in the team from longtime owner Mark Davis, sources told ESPN.

title: NYU's 91-game win streak ends in D-III Final Four
content: Two-time defending champion NYU lost 60-52 to Scranton in the Final Four of the Division III NCAA tournament on Thursday night, ending the Violets' 91-game winning streak.

title: 🏀 Women's tournament: Bracket breakdown
content: ESPN talent cast their votes for which foursome will reach the Final Four. Will Phoenix be full of chalk?

title: 'They're not even close': Why a Giannis trade might be even more complicated this summer
content: As the Giannis trade watch enters another offseason, a rare ownership structure and financial turmoil have left opposing teams wondering: Who's in charge here?

title: After letting the Super Bowl MVP walk, what's the Seahawks' plan at running back?
content: Kenneth Walker's departure leaves a hole in a backfield already weakened by Zach Charbonnet's injury.

title: Could Cam Jordan be a Chief? Unpacking KC's free agency, and what's next
content: The Chiefs hope their free agent class can make a bigger impact than last year's underwhelming acquisitions.

title: Welcome to 'The Reef': LIU's 'fins up' chant has turned a near-empty gym into March magic
content: A few college basketball fanatics were looking for a local team to root for in 2023. They landed on the LIU Sharks -- and turned rooting for them into a passion.

title: From Detroit's rising star to the Yankees' shortstop situation: What to know from MLB spring training
content: What did you miss at major league camps this spring while watching the World Baseball Classic? Here's what stood out to us from Florida and Arizona.

title: Who's your first signing? Most annoying coach? Best city? ESPN's player survey﻿
content: LaLiga players answered ESPN's questions on everything from which one star they would sign for their team to those all-important EA FC player ratings.

title: 'Street dog mentality': Buddy the Dog inspires Queens University men's basketball
content: A hollowed-out replica of a German Shepherd dog has become Queens University's unofficial mascot in its first NCAA tournament.

title: NHL Power Rankings: New 1-32 poll, points pace vs. preseason projections
content: The Sabres have charged into the top three. Plus, how has each team done this season compared to its preseason over/under?

title: NHL playoff watch: Who's winning the Presidents' Trophy?
content: Here's how the race for the top overall seed looks. Plus, updated playoff projections, draft lottery standings.

title: Power Rankings: How did Arsenal drop and Man City rise in ratings of all teams?
content: ESPN's Premier League Power Rankings return to look at all 20 teams: Why did Arsenal drop while Man City replaced them?

title: 10 great signings, six great trades: The NFL free agency moves that Walder graded with an 'A'
content: We've graded more than 60 signings and trades over the past few weeks. But only 16 moves received top marks. We ranked those deals.

title: Tracking NFL free agency: We recapped all the signings, trades and cuts from March
content: We followed every signing, trade, cut, contract restructures and other moves over the course of two weeks.

title: Yates' rankings for the NFL draft: Sizing up the top 50 prospects, plus scouting reports
content: Who are the best players in this year's NFL draft class? Where do they stand out? Field Yates stacks his top 50 prospects.

title: LeBron in Miami -- where he was at his career best
content: When was LeBron James' peak? There's an argument to be made for 2013, when his Miami Heat did not lose for 52 straight days.

title: Women's tournament odds: UConn odds-on favorite; UCLA, Texas, South Carolina next
content: Odds for each team to advance through the bracket and to win the 2026 women's college basketball championship.

title: Men's tournament: Four bets and an Eliminator pick for Friday's games
content: As you prepare for tipoff, here are our best bets for the first round, plus picks for the new Eliminator game.

title: 2026 NCAA wrestling championships: Schedule, how to watch
content: It's time for the 2026 NCAA wrestling championships! This year crowned the first women's tournament champion. Check out how to watch now.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Chelsea want to extend Fernández amid PSG, Madrid interest
content: Chelsea could make Enzo Fernández their highest-earner amid interest from Paris Saint-Germain, Real Madrid and others. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Potential busts to avoid in 2026
content: Who does Tristan H. Cockcroft think will underachieve in 2026? We have the names to steer clear of when drafting your rosters.

title: Kerala Assembly Elections: IUML, INL clash as equations shift in Kozhikode South
content: If the NDA candidate polls above 25,000 votes, the winner’s margin will likely drop substantially, making it one of the closest victories in the State

title: Senior citizens to protest in Hubballi on March 24
content: Seeking fulfilment of their long-pending demands including uniform pension rules across the country, separate budget for senior citizens and others, senior citizens from across the state will take out a protest march in Hubballi on March 24.

title: Karnataka Bypolls: Congress faces internal rift over choice of candidate in Davanagere South, Bagalkot
content: Randeep Singh Surjewala, AICC general secretary in-charge of Karnataka, rushed to Bengaluru on Friday (March 20) and held discussions to finalise candidates

title: Telangana puts hospitals under fire safety radar amid nationwide blaze concerns
content: Fire audits begin with 140 hospitals on day one; checks to continue for 10–12 days covering between 1,400 and 1,600 government and private hospital buildings

title: Chief Minister Chandrababu Naidu reaches Tirumala on a two-day visit
content: He is scheduled to offer prayers in the early hours of March 21, personally serve breakfast to pilgrims at the Matrusri Tarigonda Vengamamba Nitya Annadanam Complex, and inaugurate the Water and Food Analysis Laboratory and State Food Laboratory established in collaboration with FSSAI

title: Three students drown in Godavari, two more missing
content: The bodies of three youths, natives of Bhadrachalam in Telangana and Madanapalle, have been recovered

title: City gets static allocation in budget despite expanded city region
content: The 2026-27 budget shows minimal change in allocations after the tri-corporation area was renamed as Core Urban Region, with most GHMC figures retained, major funds going to infrastructure projects, and reduced allocations for disaster response, MMTS and heritage authority works.

title: A.P. CM orders officials to submit crop loss report within two days
content: Naidu assesses the impact of heavy wind, untimely rains, and hailstorms in the State; estimated total crop damage across categories has been pegged at ₹63 crore so far

title: Davangere bypoll: Eight candidates file nominations
content: Eight candidates filed nine sets of nomination papers for the bypoll to Davangere South Assembly Constituency on Friday

title: Chief Minister Chandrababu Naidu likely to visit Udayagiri constituency on April 1
content: This will be the Chief Minister’s maiden visit to the backward and remote constituency after returning to power

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: civic issues take centre stage as electors in Chepauk-Thiruvallikeni seek permanent solutions
content: The DMK stronghold is set for a 4-cornered contest, with the ruling party and its allies, the AIADMK and BJP, TVK, and NTK in the fray. A few party representatives say they expect a narrow victory margin as it is likely that voters aged 18-30 may back parties such as TVK over the Dravidian majors

title: Food adulteration: H-FAST to target supply chain, source units in crackdown
content: A toll-free number - 8712661212 has been set up for the public to report cases of food adulteration and unsafe food practices, while complaints can also be shared through official social media platforms of H-FAST

title: Chartered relief flight from Dammam to arrive in Thiruvananthapuram on March 22
content: Pravasi outfits in Bahrain arranged the chartered flight to Kerala via Dammam in Saudi Arabia in the absence of scheduled flight services from Bahrain

title: Kerala government departments told to avoid end-of-fiscal rush to clear bills, cheques
content: Any treasury instrument submitted after the time limit of 5 p.m. on March 24 will not be accepted, says Finance dept

title: Technical screening of film on Mahipathi Dasa in Hubballi today
content: A Kannada film on 17th-century saint poet Mahipathi Dasa is ready and a technical screening of the film will be done in Hubballi on Saturday

title: Telangana Budget 2026-27: Allocation for irrigation department slashed by ₹740 crore
content: In budget to farm sector, ₹3,500 crore is meant for bonus to agricultural produce, ₹1,886 crore for crop insurance

title: Thiruvananthapuram-based brand, Hyve, is the official sportswear partner of Chennai Super Kings
content: Hyve, founded by Rakesh Rajeev and functioning at KINFRA Apparel Park near Kazhakkoottam, has entered into a two-year contract with Chennai Super Kings as its official sportswear partner

title: Man dies after getting stuck in R.G. Kar Hospital lift; BJP accuses Bengal govt. of negligence
content: Family of the victim accused the hospital authorities of negligence and mismanagement in rescue operations

title: Industries Dept. gets ₹3,490 cr. allocation in Budget
content: Global firms, reputed institutions shifting investments to Telangana on the back of the importance State accords to industries: Bhatti Vikramarka

title: Telangana Budget 2026-27: BRS legislators stage protest demanding Congress to implement ‘six guarantees’ poll promise
content: They displayed placards in the name of “debt cards” with slogans on the unkept promises made as part of the Six Guarantees and a large number of other promises made by the Congress party before the 2023 Assembly elections

title: Budget created discontent within Congress: BJP State unit president Vijayendra
content: He alleges that the Budget lacked substantive measures to spur the State’s development and did not provide significant relief to the farmers.

title: Uttarakhand gets five new Ministers as Pushkar Dhami expands Cabinet
content: With this, the Council of Ministers reached to its full strength of 12; the expansion is being viewed as part of the ruling party’s preparations ahead of 2027 Assembly elections

title: Congress high command decides Cabinet reshuffle: Home Minister
content: G. Parameshwara says it is natural to have aspirations, and there is nothing wrong in seeking a ministerial post.

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly elections | Seat-sharing to be finalised in four days: Palaniswami
content: Making it clear that the composition of the alliance had been more or less firmed up, Edappadi K. Palaniswami said AIADMK’s manifesto would be released in a week

title: Telangana Budget 2026-27: Allocations to farm, irrigation, energy sectors almost static
content: Despite stupendous performance being put up by the Agriculture sector, the allocation for it is pruned to ₹23,179 for 2026-27 from ₹24,439 crore in 2025-26

title: Mamata woos voters with 10 commitments, says Bengal will be ‘destination for industry’
content: Mamata Banerjee’s promises range from industrial infrastructure, upgraded schools, better healthcare and 24/7 power supply among others

title: 'Cowards': Trump attacks Nato for not joining Iran war, warns US will 'remember'
content: Former President Donald Trump labeled Nato allies "cowards" for refusing to join the US-led military campaign against Iran. He criticized their complaints about high oil prices while not assisting in securing the Strait of Hormuz. Trump warned this lack of support would be detrimental to Nato's future.

title: 'Parks, tourists sites not safe': Iran vows to hunt down US, Israeli officials worldwide
content: Iran's armed forces have issued a severe threat, vowing to hunt down US and Israeli officials globally, even in recreational areas. This warning comes amid ongoing airstrikes from the US and Israel, which Iran claims have weakened its military. The remarks raise concerns about potential militant operations beyond West Asia if the conflict escalates.

title: USS Tripoli heads to Iran: Trump eyes occupying Kharg Island, break Iran's grip on Hormuz
content: The US warship USS Tripoli is heading to the Middle East, potentially near Iran's Kharg Island, carrying 2,200 Marines. This deployment amid rising US-Iran tensions highlights the strategic importance of Kharg Island as Iran's primary oil export hub and a key chokepoint in global energy markets.

title: Chuck Norris, martial artist and actor, dies at 86
content: Legendary martial artist and 'Walker, Texas Ranger' star Chuck Norris has passed away at 86. His family confirmed his peaceful death in Hawaii after a recent hospitalization. Known for his action roles and martial arts prowess, Norris leaves behind a significant legacy. Tributes are pouring in globally for the beloved icon.

title: Next casualty of the US-Iran war may mean internet shutdown for you if war spreads to Red Sea
content: The US-Iran conflict is impacting vital underwater internet cables. Meta has paused a major project connecting Africa and the Gulf. Installation ships are stranded. These cables carry over 95% of global internet traffic. Damage to these undersea lines could disrupt services worldwide. The Red Sea and Strait of Hormuz are critical data corridors.

title: 'Dhurandhar : The Revenge': Ranveer Singh film eyes Rs 250 crore global mark
content: The Indian box office is witnessing a historic moment as Aditya Dhar and Ranveer Singh’s 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' has already surged to a cumulative domestic net of Rs. 165.36 crore by Friday afternoon. Despite an ‘A’ rating and a massive 3-hour 49-minute runtime, the film is on track to cross the Rs. 230 crore global gross mark by the end of Day 2.

title: Years after Zuckerberg called it 'the next frontier’ for company, Meta shuts down Horizon worlds
content: Meta is ending its virtual reality social network Horizon Worlds on Quest headsets. The app will be removed from the Quest store by March 2026 and fully discontinued on VR devices by June 2026. Horizon Worlds will then operate solely as a mobile application.

title: 'I feel embarrassed': AB de Villiers rips into IPL openers, stat comparison
content: AB de Villiers expressed frustration with IPL batting comparisons, particularly between middle-order players and openers. He argued that openers have a significant advantage due to fielding restrictions and favorable conditions, making their stats unfairly inflated. De Villiers believes this setup is tough on bowlers and even leads to lucky boundaries for batters.

title: Hit for 1st-ball 6, Ravindra Jadeja mocks Yashasvi Jaiswal's ‘no sleep’ claim - Watch
content: Yashasvi Jaiswal stole the show in Rajasthan Royals’ IPL 2026 practice, smashing Ravindra Jadeja for a six off his first ball despite saying he hadn’t slept well. Jadeja’s amused reaction went viral. After a poor 2025 season, RR hope such moments signal a turnaround, with new additions and young talents boosting confidence ahead of the campaign.

title: Jogging app reveals location of French aircraft carrier near Middle East
content: A French officer inadvertently revealed the location of the aircraft carrier Charles de Gaulle by publicly recording a run on the Strava app. The vessel, deployed to the eastern Mediterranean, was reportedly northwest of Cyprus. This incident highlights ongoing security concerns with fitness app data, following similar past exposures.

title: JPMorgan deploys tech to track junior employees working hours, but no it is not to 'punish' them, but to make sure…
content: JPMorgan Chase is now comparing junior bankers' self-reported hours with IT data to monitor workloads and address overwork concerns. This initiative aims for transparency and well-being, mirroring similar moves by Goldman Sachs and Bank of America. The banking industry faces scrutiny over demanding hours, prompting these technological interventions to ensure employee welfare.

title: 'Can't have random plans': Where did India go wrong at Women's Asia Cup
content: Former India international Aditi Chauhan calls India’s Asia Cup campaign a mix of promise and reality check, praising emerging talent while highlighting structural flaws. She stresses better preparation, a stronger league and overseas exposure as key to bridging the gap with Asia’s best and turning World Cup qualification from ambition into a realistic goal.

title: India sends 2.5 tons of medical aid to Kabul, slams Pak's 'heinous attack'
content: India has sent a 2.5-ton consignment of medical supplies and equipment to Kabul following a deadly airstrike on a drug rehabilitation center. The shipment aims to support the treatment and recovery of those injured in the March 16 attack, which reportedly killed over 400 people. India reiterated its solidarity with the Afghan people and commitment to humanitarian support.

title: Safe passage for $2m? Iran sets up 'corridor' for ships to transit Strait of Hormuz
content: Iran has established a new safe shipping corridor in the Strait of Hormuz. Only ships with prior approval from Iranian authorities can use this route. Several countries are in talks with Tehran for their vessels. This controlled passage offers an alternative amid ongoing regional disruptions. Some Indian ships have already used this supervised route.

title: Shobhaa De reviews Dhurandhar 2, praises Arjun Rampal, misses Akshaye Khanna
content: Shobhaa De offers a mixed review of 'Dhurandhar 2', finding it predictable and lacking the depth of its predecessor. While praising Arjun Kapoor's and Sanjay Dutt's performances, she critiques the writing, execution, and absence of Akshaye Khanna's character, deeming the sequel less engaging and not a masterpiece.

title: 10 'Protigya' for Bengal: Mamata launches TMC manifesto, flags 'deep conspiracy' by BJP
content: West Bengal CM Mamata Banerjee released the TMC's election manifesto, accusing the BJP of conspiracies to capture the state and weaken institutions. She unveiled '10 Protigya' pledges focusing on welfare, jobs, housing, and infrastructure, promising enhanced financial aid for women and support for youth and farmers. Elections are scheduled for April 23 and April 29.

title: IPL 2026: 4 likely overseas playing XI picks for each team
content: The IPL 2026 season kicks off on March 28, with franchises finalizing their overseas player combinations. Teams are strategically selecting key international talents to bolster their squads, aiming for strong starts amidst injury concerns and last-minute withdrawals. Overseas stars will be pivotal in shaping team performances throughout the tournament.

title: Gag order on Mohammad Deepak: HC refuses to quash FIR against gym owner
content: Uttarakhand High Court imposed a gag order on gym owner Mohammad Deepak, restraining him from social media statements amid an ongoing investigation. The court refused to quash the FIR against him, citing his status as a "suspected accused" and deeming his requests for police protection and action against officials as attempts to pressure the investigation.

title: Indian national dies in Saudi Arabia: MEA says 6 deaths so far amid Middle East tensions
content: Tragedy struck Riyadh as an Indian national lost their life on March 18th amidst escalating regional tensions. The Indian Embassy in Saudi Arabia has confirmed the demise and is actively supporting the deceased's family while coordinating with local authorities.

title: AB de Villiers reveals ‘naughty’ desire in his, Virat Kohli’s career downfall
content: For over a decade, Virat Kohli and AB de Villiers were RCB’s heartbeat, yet an IPL trophy eluded them. De Villiers reflected that their shared “naughty” trait, wanting to win too much, was both their strength and downfall, making losses feel personal. Their intense competitiveness forged legendary partnerships but came with heavy emotional tolls, highlighting the fine line between passion and pressure.

title: 'Weak link Rahane, costly decisions' could spell disaster for KKR, warns Ex-IPL star
content: Former CSK batter S Badrinath has expressed significant concerns for KKR ahead of IPL 2026, labeling captain Ajinkya Rahane a "weak link" and questioning the team's leadership and costly squad decisions. Badrinath also criticized the record Rs 25.20 crore signing of Cameron Green, citing his recent poor form and questioning his value.

title: US F-35 stealth jet hit: How Iran’s infrared systems spooked the ‘ghost of the skies’
content: An F-35 stealth fighter was reportedly damaged and forced to land after being hit by Iranian fire during a combat mission over Iran. Analysts suggest Iran's infrared-guided air defense systems, which track heat signatures rather than radar, may have played a role in targeting the advanced aircraft.

title: Mohsin Naqvi’s PCB termed ‘weak’, accused of ‘kneeling before players’
content: Pakistan cricket faces renewed criticism after a T20 World Cup exit and ODI series loss. Former opener Ahmed Shehzad alleges the PCB built up a select group of players, now failing to deliver, while neglecting accountability and player development. He claims the board's weakness empowers these stars, hindering genuine progress and leaving fans disillusioned.

title: Price of premium petrol hiked by up to Rs 2.35 amid Middle East tensions
content: Premium petrol prices have seen a hike of over Rs 2 per litre across state-run oil companies, while regular fuel and diesel rates remain steady. This adjustment comes amidst global energy market volatility fueled by the Middle East crisis, impacting India's significant oil import dependence and potentially widening the import bill.

title: Candace Owens says she was closest to Charlie Kirk amid row
content: Candace Owens has sparked fresh controversy by claiming Charlie Kirk was unaware of key details during his relationship with Erika Kirk. She alleges Erika misrepresented connections to Kanye West’s circle, raising questions about credibility and hidden truths. The remarks have triggered intense online debate, with critics demanding evidence while supporters cite Owens’ proximity as reason to take her claims seriously.

title: 'Corruption in judiciary' row: Centre forms panel to rewrite NCERT class 8 chapter
content: A three-member expert committee will rewrite the Class 8 NCERT textbook chapter on the judiciary. This follows a controversy over a section mentioning corruption in the judiciary. The Supreme Court has closed its proceedings after the government's assurance. NCERT had previously withdrawn the chapter. The committee includes K. K. Venugopal, Indu Malhotra, and Justice Aniruddha Bose.

title: Happy Eid-ul-Fitr: Best Eid mubarak messages, quotes, wishes, and images
content: Eid-ul-Fitr 2026 will soon arrive, bringing joy and marking the end of Ramadan. Celebrations depend on the moon sighting, expected around March 19th or 20th. Muslims worldwide will offer prayers, share feasts, and exchange gifts. This festival of breaking the fast emphasizes gratitude, unity, and charity. Homes will glow with lights as communities come together.

title: India’s 2027 vision is clear — except when it comes to Virat, Rohit
content: Despite clear long-term ambitions from coaching and selection staff, uncertainty looms over the ODI futures of Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma. While both superstars are performing well, the Indian cricket board needs to initiate direct dialogue regarding their inclusion in the 2027 World Cup plans. This lack of clarity, in the current scenario, hurts the dressing room more than it helps promote competitiveness.

title: Sharjeel Imam walks out of jail after over 6 years; Delhi court imposes tight curbs
content: Sharjeel Imam has been granted interim bail for 10 days to attend his brother's wedding and visit his ailing mother. The court imposed strict conditions, including no media interaction and limited contact with case-related individuals. Imam must surrender on March 30th after nearly six years in jail.

title: Big embarrassment for Canada: Top cop says no India link in transnational threats
content: Canadian police have found no evidence linking threats or criminal activity in the country to India, despite past diplomatic tensions. RCMP commissioner Mike Duheme stated ongoing investigations do not connect alleged intimidation cases to any foreign entity. This comes as diplomatic ties between Canada and India show signs of improvement.

title: Watch: Australian PM heckled at Eid prayers in Sydney for supporting Israel
content: Tensions flared at an Eid prayer gathering in Western Sydney as a few attendees heckled Prime Minister Anthony Albanese and Home Affairs Minister Tony Burke, demanding their removal. Shouts of "genocide supporters" echoed, reflecting community anger over the government's Gaza response and Islamophobia.

title: 'India can end ongoing war': RSS chief calls for global harmony as Iran war escalate
content: RSS chief Mohan Bhagwat asserted that India possesses the capability to end the Middle East conflict, noting global recognition of its peace-promoting role. He attributed wars to selfish interests and dominance, advocating for harmony and India's traditional philosophy of interconnectedness to restore global balance through dharma.

title: Rajasthan Royals cautioned over Sooryavanshi: Dravid-like mentor key this season
content: Former India all-rounder Irfan Pathan urges caution around teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's IPL 2026 hype, acknowledging his potential while highlighting upcoming challenges. Pathan believes Vaibhav's consistent scoring across formats proves his 'dum,' suggesting this season could be his breakout.  Mental resilience and adaptation will be key for the 15-year-old prodigy.

title: UP teacher falls victim to ‘pig-butchering romance' scam, Rs 49L siphoned via 'trading platform'
content: a govt school teacher from Lucknow fell prey to a ‘pig butchering romance’ scam . it is an insidious blend of romance, deception, and financial fraud . police officials said it was the first such scam in the city . a resident of Jankipuram came in contact with a woman identifying herself as Isha Desai .

title: Runaway Couple Reaches Supreme Court To Get Married. This Happened Next
content: The couple, a 19-year-old woman from Bihar and a 22-year-old man from Uttar Pradesh, fled to Delhi to get married.

title: Jalukbari: How Himanta Biswa Sarma's 25-Year Fortress Stays Unshakeable
content: Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma's dominance here is rooted in a long and steady political journey.

title: "We Said No": Lanka Turned Down This US Request At Beginning Of Iran War
content: Sri Lanka refused permission to the United States to station two of its warplanes at a civilian airport in the island's south in early March, President...

title: Iranian Man Among 2 Arrested In Scotland For Trying To Enter Naval Base
content: The Naval Base Clyde, known as Faslane, houses the UK's Trident nuclear weapons system, four submarines armed with Trident ballistic missiles.

title: CBI Questions Anil Ambani For 2nd Day In Rs 2,929-Crore Bank Fraud Case
content: The CBI on Friday questioned industrialist Anil Ambani for over six hours in connection with a Rs 2,929-crore cheating case, registered against Reliance Communications Ltd and him on a complaint by the State Bank of India, officials said.

title: Air India's Flight To Nowhere: Wrong Plane, 8 Hours In Air, And A U-Turn
content: The aircraft was a Boeing 777-200LR, while Air India currently has approval to operate only its Boeing 777-300ER fleet on services to Canada.

title: "You're Not Marrying Maid": Supreme Court As Divorce Case Cites Wife Not Doing Chores
content: The man, the petitioner in the case, initiated divorce proceedings, alleging that only a week after marriage, the woman's attitude changed and she started mistreating him.

title: Bangladesh Envoy Meets S Jaishankar, Foreign Minister May Visit Next Month
content: Riaz Hamidullah met a senior Indian cabinet minister for the first time since taking charge in May last year.

title: Zomato Increases Food Delivery Platform Fee To Rs 14.90 Per Order
content: Food delivery aggregator Zomato has hiked the platform fee it charges users by Rs 2.40 to Rs 14.90 per order, its app showed on Friday.

title: Stranded Indian Students Leave Iran Via Armenia To Reach Home Ahead Of Eid
content: With direct flights curtailed because of airspace closures and security concerns, many students embarked on gruelling overland journeys to neighbouring country Armenia.

title: US Defence Secretary Uses Biblical Language To Justify US Strikes On Iran
content: US defence secretary Hegseth, who has a history of defending the Crusades, has openly justified US involvement in Iran using pro-Christian rhetoric.

title: Opinion: Opinion | The Russia-China Axis That Has Made Iran So Difficult For Trump
content: Russia and China are perhaps pleased to see America's anti-missile systems and other military equipment being depleted. The US has moved its military assets from the Indo-Pacific to the Gulf, which benefits China.

title: 'Indirect Yet Palpable': Iran War's Impact On Real Estate In Mumbai
content: Iran War Impact: Mumbai's real estate sector has started witnessing a drop in demand from global companies for office spaces.

title: Boy, 8, Dies After Slipping In Water-Filled Construction Pit In Mumbai: Cops
content: An eight-year-old boy lost his life after accidentally falling into a water-filled construction pit in Mumbai's Malad (East) area, a police official said on Friday.

title: Eid ul Fitr 2026 Moon Sighting LIVE Updates: Celebrations In Saudi Arabia, UAE Dampened By Iran War
content: Eid ul-Fitr 2026 Live Updates: The celebrations in the Middle Eastern nations will remain low-key due to the ongoing Iran war.

title: Russia Plans A New Offensive In Ukraine, US Mediated Peace Talks On Hold
content: Russian military seems to be preparing for a spring and summer campaign to claim Ukrainian-controlled parts of the eastern Donetsk region.

title: "Conflict Of Interest": Chief Justice Recuses From Poll Body Appointments Case
content: A bench was hearing petitions on the non-inclusion of the Chief Justice of India in the panel which selects the Chief Election Commissioner and Election Commissioners

title: Bhagwant Mann Inaugurates Tata Steel's Rs 3,200-Crore Facility In Punjab
content: Punjab Chief Minister Bhagwant Mann on Friday inaugurated Tata Steel's state-of-the-art scrap-based electric arc furnace built with an investment of nearly Rs 3,200 crore.

title: 31 Rajya Sabha MPs billionaires, 73 face criminal cases: ADR analysis
content: analysis of affidavits of 229 out of 233 Rajya Sabha MPs shows that 73 (32%) MPs have declared criminal cases against themselves and 31 (14%) are billionaires . one MP has declared a case of murder, four have attempts to murder, and three have crimes against women .

title: Why DC coach expects Defenders to get every team's best shot

title: How did Tottenham go from Europa League champs to a very real relegation battle?
content: the champions league anthem was played at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium on Wednesday . atletico madrid were in town, and Spurs were playing in football's premier club competition with the prize of a quarterfinal against Barcelona at stake . despite a 3-2 second-leg victory for Igor Tudor's team, Spurs suffered a 7-5 aggregate defeat .

title: NBA debut to March Madness: Sandfort surprises brother in Nebraska win
content: payton Sandfort caught a 3 a.m. taxi and a flight to surprise his younger brother . he made his first NBA debut in the Thunder's 121-92 win against the Brooklyn Nets . his brother, a junior forward who signed a two-way contract with the Thunder earlier this month, was on his home court .

title: 'The best is still yet to come': Why Wyatt Langford is an AL MVP sleeper pick
content: Wyatt Langford landed at no. 4 on the top 100 prospects list of ESPN's Kiley McDaniel . a couple of years ago, he broke camp with the defending champions as their every-day left fielder . the outfielder had spent just 44 games in the minor leagues at that point .
